# QuickQR — Full Documentation

## Product Description
QuickQR is a browser-based QR code generator that creates scannable QR codes in real-time. Users type content (URL, text, email, or phone number) and the QR code generates instantly with live preview.

**Live site**: https://www.quickqr.app

## Core Functionality

### Static QR Generator (Free, No Account Required)
- Type any URL, text, email address, or phone number
- QR code generates live as user types
- Customize dots color and background color via color pickers
- Download QR code as PNG at full resolution
- Works completely offline after page load

### Dynamic QR Codes (Pro Feature, Requires Account)
- Create an account to save QR codes
- Edit destination URL after creation
- View scan analytics: total scans, location data, device breakdown
- A/B testing support with multiple variants
- Pay-as-you-go pricing

## Technical Stack
- **Framework**: Astro 5.x with App Router
- **Adapter**: @astrojs/vercel (Vercel serverless)
- **Styling**: Plain CSS (custom properties), no Tailwind
- **QR Library**: qr-code-styling (client-side only, dynamically imported)
- **Auth**: Supabase (Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, email/password)
- **Icons**: Inline SVG

## File Structure
```
src/
  pages/
    index.astro       — Main landing page with QR generator
    auth/
      signin.astro    — Email/password sign in
      signup.astro    — Email/password sign up
      callback.astro  — OAuth callback handler
  components/
    Navigation.astro  — Top navigation bar
    AuthSidebar.astro — Slide-in auth panel
    Footer.astro      — Site footer
  layouts/
    MainLayout.astro  — Base layout (imports Navigation, Footer, AuthSidebar)
  lib/
    supabase.ts       — Supabase client (PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY)
  config/
    supabase.ts       — Supabase config wrapper
  styles/
    global.css        — CSS custom properties and resets
    home.css          — Homepage, hero, QR section, features, comparison, marquee
    navigation.css    — Nav styles
    auth.css          — Auth page styles
    comparison.css    — Comparison section
    footer.css        — Footer styles
    pricing.css       — Pricing section
    admin.css         — Admin dashboard
    qr-results.css    — QR results page
```

## Authentication
- Supabase auth integration via @supabase/supabase-js
- Providers: Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, email/password
- Auth sidebar slides in from right side of screen (not separate page flow for OAuth)
- OAuth redirectTo: window.location.origin
- Auth callback at /auth/callback.astro

## QR Code Behavior
- Library: qr-code-styling v1.9.2
- Client-side only — must be dynamically imported (never at module level in SSR context)
- Supported types: URL, Text, Email (mailto: prefix), Phone (tel: prefix)
- Color customization: dotsColor (#000000 default), background (#ffffff default)
- PNG download via qr.download({ name: 'quickqr', extension: 'png' })
- QR updates on every keystroke (input event)

## CSS Design System
```
--color-teal-50: #f0fdfa
--color-teal-100: #ccfbf1
--color-teal-200: #99f6e4
--color-teal-400: #2dd4bf
--color-teal-500: #14b8a6
--color-teal-600: #0d9488
--color-teal-700: #0f766e
--color-gray-50: #f9fafb
--color-gray-100: #f3f4f6
--color-gray-200: #e5e7eb
--color-gray-300: #d1d5db
--color-gray-400: #9ca3af
--color-gray-500: #6b7280
--color-gray-600: #4b5563
--color-gray-700: #374151
--color-gray-800: #1f2937
--color-gray-900: #111827
--shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05)
--shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1)
--shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1)
--radius: 0.75rem
--radius-lg: 1rem
```

## Supabase Schema Notes
- Auth: uses Supabase Auth (no custom schema)
- Database: configured but schema details depend on project setup
- Environment variables needed:
  - PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
  - PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
